content.en:
"The Mullet Domain Ancestor has fallen!!"

Many of the strongest domain ancestors who knew the Mullet Domain Ancestor were shocked.

The strength of the Mullet Domain Ancestor is very strong, and it is unbelievable that such a powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor could fall so easily!

And after Ye Tian killed the Mullet Domain Ancestor, he also let the copy body put away the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

Even if he has reached the level of a top domain ancestor now, the side effects of using the Forbidden Yuan Blade are still very large, so naturally he can not use it.

Moreover, he killed the Mullet Domain Ancestor, which was enough to deter many Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Sure enough, as soon as the Mullet Domain Ancestor fell, many Supreme Domain Ancestors retreated one after another, not daring to snatch the Soul Saint Realm Flower anymore.

Even the True Spirit Domain Ancestor and the others gave up snatching the Soul Saint Realm Flower in their hearts, after all, they were not sure to kill the Mullet Domain Ancestor, but Ye Tian could kill the Mullet Domain Ancestor in a few moves, and this strength had already surpassed them.

Even if Ye Tian used the effect of the Forbidden Yuan Blade and killed the Mullet Domain Ancestor at the cost of his clone, this was also his own strength!

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, let's retreat !!"

A Powerful Domain Ancestor gave up.

There was no way, they felt that they couldn't deal with Ye Tian, and once they made a move, the possibility of falling was too great.

Compared to the Soul Saint Realm Flower, one's own life is naturally more important.

As one of the Supreme Domain Ancestors retreated, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors began to hesitate.

After all, Ye Tian's desperate efforts were enough to be equivalent to a second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, and if they wanted to kill a second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, they were afraid that they would have countless casualties!

Moreover, at the critical moment, the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate would definitely not sit idly by, and they would still not be able to snatch the Soul Saint Realm Flower at that time.

"Retreat!"

A third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor retired.

This retreat directly caused some of the top Supreme Domain Ancestors to leave the Soul Saint Realm.

And the other Supreme Domain Ancestors naturally didn't dare to continue to stay, and retreated one after another.

In the blink of an eye, the ancestors of the Supreme Domain retreated cleanly.

But a few of them did not retreat, but spoke: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, we were wrong, we apologize to you!"

These were the strongest domain ancestors with the cultivation qualifications of the Soul Saint Realm, and they had also participated in the siege before, although they only attacked once, they undoubtedly completely offended Ye Tian.

"If you don't leave, then don't go!"

Ye Tian's killing intent spread.

Suddenly, those Supreme Domain Ancestors immediately retreated, not daring to stay at all, otherwise they would really fall.

This time, the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate did not make a move.

In fact, they were also waiting, seeing that Ye Tian's combat power was invincible in the back, they naturally wouldn't make a move, otherwise they wouldn't be able to grab the Soul Saint Realm flower, not to mention, but also said that if they offended the first saint son of the battle gate, that would be a loss-making deal.

The ancestors of the Supreme Domain all left, and Ye Tian went to pick the Soul Saint Realm flower with peace of mind.

Rumble!!!!

Countless black shadows rushed towards Ye Tian's soul, wanting to tear Ye Tian's soul apart.

At this time, Ye Tian used the Holy Technique to protect his soul.

Even so, Ye Tian felt a little pain.

However, in the end, Ye Tian still picked the Soul Saint Realm flower.

......

"Congratulations to the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws for obtaining the Soul Saint Realm Flower!"

"Congratulations to the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws for obtaining the Soul Saint Realm Flower!"

"Congratulations to the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws for obtaining the Soul Saint Realm Flower!"

One of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate congratulated.

However, from their words, a strong jealousy could be heard.

After all, with the Soul Saint Realm Flower, he will become an invincible domain ancestor in the future!

Moreover, Ye Tian controlled a Soul Saint Realm, and he could even cultivate multiple Invincible Domain Ancestors in the future, what an enviable thing!

Ye Tian did not stay in the Soul Saint Realm, but quickly left and returned to the Human Realm.

Ye Tian was not ready to use that Soul Saint Realm Flower by himself, he was very confident in himself, the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm was nothing to him, but his wife and son could not easily break through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm.

Therefore, he was ready to give this Soul Saint Realm Flower to his closest wife, Xiao Yue.

Now, Xiao Yue has also broken through to the top Domain Ancestor realm, once he steps into the Supreme Domain Ancestor level, and then raises his soul to a certain level, directly refining the Soul Saint Realm Flower, he can raise his soul to the level of giving birth to Soul Holy Light.

It is not cost-effective to use the Soul Saint Realm Flower now, and it may not be able to give birth to the Soul Holy Light, because Xiao Yue's current soul strength is still far from the birth of the Soul Holy Light, so refining the Soul Saint Realm Flower now is only able to strengthen the soul many times.

The following days were relatively peaceful, and although many domain ancestors from the Dark Sacred Realm did not have the opportunity to enter the Soul Saint Realm, they did not leave the Dao Mountain Realm.

The Dao Mountain Realm was far from being able to compare with the Dark Sacred Realm, but the Xuanxu Sacred Realm was a nascent Saint Realm after all, and the Sacred Realm was also relatively rare in the Dark Sacred Realm, and many Supreme Domain Ancestors were also difficult to cultivate in the Sacred Realm.

Moreover, the resources of the Xuanxu Saint Realm are very abundant, and the occasional birth of some fortuitous treasures is also helpful to them.

Moreover, the value of many resources here is relatively cheap, and if you cultivate here, the benefits are not small.

Moreover, they can also contact their strength in the Dark Sanctuary through the War Realm Tower, and they can also send any resources they want through the War Realm Tower.

As a result, many domain ancestors would not go back in a short period of time.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

this day.

One of Ye Tian's holy skills had been raised to the extreme, and he was only one step away from the extreme realm.

This holy skill is the Void Slash Holy Skill!

Originally, it was very difficult to cultivate a spatial holy technique like the Void Slash Holy Technique, but Ye Tian had the Void Ancestor Method, coupled with the help of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well penance, the effect was very good, so the Void Slash Holy Technique made the greatest progress.

Now, the Void Slash Holy Technique has reached the pinnacle of perfection and is about to enter the extreme level.

Once the Void Slash Saint Technique was cultivated to the extreme level, Ye Tian's strength would inevitably increase dramatically.

The Extreme Rank Saint Technique is not simple, and many Superior Domain Ancestors are difficult to cultivate a Saint Technique to the Extreme Level, which represents the extreme of the Saint Technique cultivated at the Domain Ancestor level!

However, even if Ye Tian was only one step away from the Extreme Saint Technique, it would take a long time to cultivate the Void Slash Saint Technique to the extreme.

However, Ye Tian's domain body and domain power were much purer than they were at the beginning, and his soul was much stronger, and his progress was very fast.

Originally, Ye Tian planned to cultivate steadily until he cultivated to the limit of the top domain ancestor realm, and then hit the strongest domain ancestor realm with the most stable foundation.

But suddenly, the Xuanxu Saint Realm once again attracted the attention of countless domain ancestors.
